noImmediateDescription: This order will be submitted entirely as deferred settlement using the selected remaining-balance policy.
keypadHint: Use the keypad for fast touch entry, or type directly into the amount field.
addSplitHint: Select an immediate method to start collecting payment.
activeDescription: Use this area for the active payment step, details, and fixes without scrolling the right rail.
noDetailsDescription: No extra details are required for this payment method. Keep editing the amount above or choose another method.
helperTitle: Ready for the next payment step
helperDescription: Select a payment method, edit an amount, or apply a credit. The active task will appear here.
remainingForLeg: You can allocate up to {amount} on this payment leg.
